title: Piptospatha elongata
taxonomy: Piptospatha elongata is a species of flowering plant in the family Arumaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. This plant is classified as a member of the genus Piptospatha and is further classified within the tribe Piptospathaeae. The Arumaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as the arum family. Piptospatha elongata is a unique and lesser-known member of this family.
